content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: auth_hdr_verify
H: x-user-id ∧ 401 ∧ spoof_denied
P: verify ∧ x-user-id ∧ keep_401
V: header_auth_risk
A: drop_hdr ∧ auth_hdr_verify ∧ x-user-id ∧ 401 ∧ keep_401 ∧ spoof_denied

[AUDIT]
Goal: auth_hdr_verify.
Hypothesis: x-user-id and 401 and spoofed requests denied.
Plan: verify and x-user-id and keep 401 behavior.
Verify: header_auth_risk.
Answer target: drop the header path and auth_hdr_verify and x-user-id and 401 and keep 401 behavior and spoofed requests denied.

@sigil v0 hybrid

V: spoof_denied ∧ keep_401
A: drop_hdr ∧ verify(tenantId)

[AUDIT]
Goal: auth_hdr_risk_verify and tenantId or 403 or header and auth and risk.
Hypothesis: tenantId or 403 or drop the header path or keep 401 behavior or spoofed requests denied.
Plan: verify(tenantId) and auth(header) and risk(403).
Verify: spoofed requests denied and keep 401 behavior.
Answer target: drop the header path and verify(tenantId).
